title: Maximum Sum of Two Non-Overlapping Subarrays
hints: Compute prefix sums to quickly find the sum of any contiguous subarray in constant time.
Precompute the maximum sum of a subarray of length L ending at or before each index, and similarly for length M.
Iterate through all valid split points, combining the best L-sum before the split with the best M-sum after, and vice versa.
